hypothesis: Incorporating total charge as a model input—identified in the roadmap as a planned future feature—will disproportionately improve MD simulation stability and force prediction accuracy for systems containing alkali metal ions (K, Li, Na) compared to neutral organic molecules, such that a charge-aware MACE model trained on the full SPICE2 dataset including non-neutral structures will reduce force MAE by more than 30% on solvated amino acid subsets containing these elements relative to the charge-naive baseline presented here.
